title: haveabreak
pwaUpdateDesc: A new version is ready. Tap refresh to update.
subtitle: Disconnect to Reconnect
seoDesc: A mindful timer PWA that helps you take a real screen break. Leave your device untouched until the timer finishes.
moveWarningDesc: The goal is to step away. Please keep hands off the mouse and keyboard!
moveWarningDescMobile: The goal is to step away. Please keep hands off the screen!
congratsDesc: You took a genuine break. Your body and mind thank you.
timerTips: Don't move your cursor. Just sit back, relax and breathe.
Take a deep breath in... and out.
Close your eyes for a moment.
Let go of tension in your body.
noCustomTips: No custom tips yet. Add one above!
landingF1Desc: Stepping away from your screen reduces eye strain and mental fatigue.
landingF2Desc: Our sensor detection ensures you don't cheat. Touching your mouse or keyboard resets the timer.
landingF3Desc: Short, genuine breaks are scientifically proven to improve focus when you return.

home.title: haveabreak

timer.title: Timed Break
timer.subtitle: Mindful Rest
timer.description: Step away from your screen and truly relax. Movement detection ensures you stay focused on resting.

frame.title: Digital Frame

card.title: Book Excerpts
card.subtitle: Reading Collection
card.description: Collect and manage your favorite book excerpts. Read beautiful passages anytime.

card.pageSubtitle: Swipe through book excerpts like short videos
card.noQuotesInFeed: No sentences in your feed. Add some books and quotes first!
card.noBooks: No books in your library yet.
card.noQuotesInBook: No quotes for this book yet. Add your first one!
card.confirmDeleteBook: Are you sure you want to delete this book and all its quotes?
card.confirmDeleteQuote: Are you sure you want to delete this quote?
card.formContentPlaceholder: Write the beautiful sentence or paragraph here...
card.dataManagementDesc: Export your books and quotes to back them up, or import data from a previous backup.
card.subscriptionDesc: Subscribe to a remote JSON configuration file for automatic updates.
card.quoteSortOrderDesc: Choose how quotes are sorted in book detail view.
card.sortByCreatedTimeDesc: Sort by when quotes were added
card.sortByPageNote: Quotes without page numbers will be sorted last by creation time.
